TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u dadiw nu Sakizaya: Sakizayaay a tademaw misangaay tu dadiw: caykatineng tu misangaay tu sulit: caykatineng tu u balucu' nu misulitay : u Sakizaya a tademaw. u tatengaay a tademaw. caay katalaw ku cilal atu udad. talabuyu', tala sauwac, tala cuwacuwa limulak ku balucu', kapah ku demiad sananay. u sulit : u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u malukay tu dumiadmiad. caayay katalaw tu cilal atu udad. heyyuhu hayyan. heyyuhu hayyan. misadipit i bayu. mikalang i sauwac. limulak tu demiamiad. u dadiw nu Sakizaya: Sakizaya a tademaw u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u malukay tu dumiadmiad. caayay katalaw tu cilal atu udad. heyyuhu hayyan. heyyuhu hayyan. misadipit i bayu. mikalang i sauwac. limulak tu demiamiad.
S.PHON: u dadiw nu sakizaja: sakizajaaj a tad…ômaw misa≈ãaaj tu dadiw: ¶ajkatin…ô≈ã tu misa≈ãaaj tu sur~…æit: ¶ajkatin…ô≈ã tu u bar~…æu ¶u î~ ° nu misur~…æitaj : u sakizaja a tad…ômaw. u tat…ô≈ãaaj a tad…ômaw. ¶aaj katar~…æaw ku ¶ir~…æar~…æ atu udad. tar~…æabuju î~ °, tar~…æa sauwa ¶, tar~…æa ¶uwa ¶uwa r~…æimur~…æak ku bar~…æu ¶u î~ °, kapaƒß ku d…ômiad sananaj. u sur~…æit : u sakizaja ƒßananaj a tad…ômaw. u sakizaja ƒßananaj a tad…ômaw. u mar~…æukaj tu dumiadmiad. ¶aajaj katar~…æaw tu ¶ir~…æar~…æ atu udad. ƒß…ôjuƒßu ƒßajjan. ƒß…ôjuƒßu ƒßajjan. misadipit i baju. mikar~…æa≈ã i sauwa ¶. r~…æimur~…æak tu d…ômiamiad. u dadiw nu sakizaja: sakizaja a tad…ômaw u sakizaja ƒßananaj a tad…ômaw. u sakizaja ƒßananaj a tad…ômaw. u mar~…æukaj tu dumiadmiad. ¶aajaj katar~…æaw tu ¶ir~…æar~…æ atu udad. ƒß…ôjuƒßu ƒßajjan. ƒß…ôjuƒßu ƒßajjan. misadipit i baju. mikar~…æa≈ã i sauwa ¶. r~…æimur~…æak tu d…ômiamiad.
S.FORM: u dadiw nu Sakizaya: Sakizayaay a tademaw misangaay tu dadiw: caykatineng tu misangaay tu sulit: caykatineng tu u balucu' nu misulitay : u Sakizaya a tademaw. u tatengaay a tademaw. caay katalaw ku cilal atu udad. talabuyu', tala sauwac, tala cuwacuwa limulak ku balucu', kapah ku demiad sananay. u sulit : u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u malukay tu dumiadmiad. caayay katalaw tu cilal atu udad. heyyuhu hayyan. heyyuhu hayyan. misadipit i bayu. mikalang i sauwac. limulak tu demiamiad. u dadiw nu Sakizaya: Sakizaya a tademaw u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u sakizaya hananay a tademaw. u malukay tu dumiadmiad. caayay katalaw tu cilal atu udad. heyyuhu hayyan. heyyuhu hayyan. misadipit i bayu. mikalang i sauwac. limulak tu demiamiad.
